notes: Dashboard fixes + retirement modeling correction. Additive only; Budget, Journal, Projection, Net Worth, Scenarios, Instruments, EMI, Settings, Edit Inputs and all shared engine math are untouched by default. (1) MOBILE NAV: Dashboard is now reachable on phones via the 'More' drawer (top of the Overview group); previously it existed only in the desktop sidebar, which is hidden at mobile widths, so the page was unreachable on mobile. (2) NET WORTH RECONCILIATION: the Dashboard now derives net worth as investments + projectSavingsChain(p) + liabilities — identical to the Net Worth page — instead of the raw engine p.netWorth (which used p.cashSeries and still contained the past-contribution double-count). The chain-adjusted series is applied consistently to the hero net worth, trajectory chart, corpus projection, what-if slider, and annual review, so the Dashboard and Net Worth page agree at the same date. (3) TRUE RETIREMENT (opt-in engine override runProjection({retire:{p1StopISO,p2StopISO,contribStopISO}})): at each person's retirement month their salary/other income drops to zero, and monthly investment contributions stop once the last earner retires. Only the Dashboard passes this override; every other caller passes nothing, so their output is unchanged. This corrects the previously inflated corpus/legacy, which came from salary-funded SIPs and surplus continuing to compound decades past retirement. The Dashboard also auto-extends the projection horizon internally to life expectancy WITHOUT modifying the user's saved horizon. (4) COMPOSITION CASH: the hero composition bar/legend now uses the same chain-adjusted cash figure as the hero net worth (previously it summed raw account opening balances), so composition shares, the hero number, and the Net Worth page are mutually consistent. (5) ANNUAL REVIEW: income-growth is now robust against the opening-month salary artifact (a doubled/partial first horizon month that produced a bogus swing such as -50%); it skips the artifact-prone first index and falls back to the year's median monthly income when an endpoint is an outlier. (6) DEBT PAYOFF TRACKER: rewritten to count payments from each EMI's OWN startMonth (previously used a single 'months since horizon start' count for every loan, so all EMIs wrongly showed the same progress), to respect each EMI's real end date via _emiEndIso (including close events), to DROP fully-paid EMIs from the list, and to show not-yet-started EMIs as 'starts in N mo'. The whole Debt section is hidden when no active or future EMI remains. Scope: display + Dashboard-only computation, plus one opt-in engine override that defaults off for all existing pages. KNOWN ITEM (still deferred, unchanged): the current-month savings forecast uses the engine's PLANNED surplus, so logging a large current-month expense does not yet re-forecast future savings; that change touches projectSavingsChain and needs dedicated double-count verification before it is made.
